place: Pantai Lima, Pererenan, Mengwi, Badung Regency, Bali, Indonesia
title: Address Bali — Beachfront Residences, Pererenan
blurb: Address Bali is a five-star beachfront residence and private members' club rising a minute from the sand at Pantai Lima, Pererenan. Studios, one-bedroom homes and penthouses — fully furnished and professionally managed — sit beneath a rooftop pool, a 360° ocean-view restaurant and bar, a Japanese garden and 24/7 concierge. Conceived as a lifestyle investment, with projected returns around 15.5% per annum. Completion August 2027. Price on request.
detail:
Address Bali brings five-star hotel living and a private members' club to Pantai Lima in Pererenan — one of Bali's most exclusive and fastest-appreciating stretches of coast, a one-minute walk from the beach and minutes from the cafés, restaurants and surf of Canggu and Seseh. The building is an award-winning composition of stacked, planted terraces in timber and stone, designed to weather the tropics and age gracefully.

Behind the greenery sits a collection of fully furnished residences — studios, one-bedroom homes, and junior and master penthouses — ranging from roughly 50 to 150 m². Interiors pair warm timber, natural stone and floor-to-ceiling glass, with ground-floor homes opening to private pools and gardens and upper floors framing ocean views. Every residence is turnkey and supported by professional rental management from day one.

Life here is built around the roof: an infinity pool, sun decks and a restaurant and bar with 360° ocean views, alongside a wellness and fitness suite, a Japanese garden and a discreet 24/7 concierge. A private members' club and curated guest services turn the building into a community rather than simply a block of apartments.

Conceived as a lifestyle investment rather than a speculative play, Address Bali targets a rental yield of around 15.5% per annum, underpinned by its beachfront location and hotel-grade management. Held on an extendable leasehold structured for international buyers. Completion is scheduled for August 2027; pricing, availability and the full unit mix are shared on request.
